hero.eyebrow: An operating system for your practice
hero.subBody: Projects, finances, clients, sessions, goals — all in one clear, welcoming place. A single big-picture view that shows you exactly what this month needs.
hero.trust: Free to sign up · Leave anytime · Import and export all your data

demo.title: Your whole day, on one screen
demo.sub: Open it in the morning and see exactly what matters: where you stand, and what needs your attention right now.
demo.deviceAria: A preview of the Simplicity home screen: a big-picture view with a score of 78 percent on pace, and a list of items that need attention.
demo.moonLine: You're <0>on pace</0> to hit this month's goals — keep it up.

score.title: Big picture — one score that says it all
score.text: Instead of ten reports, one number that shows you exactly where you stand against your goals.

attention.title: Needs your attention
attention.text: Simplicity stays a step ahead and surfaces what needs action — a stuck payment, an upcoming session, a client who's gone quiet.

tailored.title: Tailored to you
tailored.text: You choose what to see, how, and when.

values.title: Less clutter. More presence.
values.sub: Three things that make Simplicity a place you'll actually enjoy running your practice from — not just another app, but a home.

allInOne.title: Everything in one place
allInOne.text: Clients, calendar, finances, tasks and goals — no more jumping between spreadsheets, WhatsApp and a notebook. One complete picture of your practice, always up to date.

clarity.title: Clarity and ease
clarity.text: We built Simplicity so that managing your information and finances feels nourishing and even fun — freeing you up to focus on what you came here to do: your own growth and the work you love.

growth.title: Goals and growth
growth.text: Simplicity doesn't just show you where you are — it keeps you in direct touch with where you want to go.

features.title: Everything you need to run your practice
features.sub: Six tools that work together — from the first inquiry to the big picture at month's end.

calendar.title: Sessions and calendar
calendar.text: Sync with Google Calendar, alerts for recurring or scheduled sessions, reminders, and income and expenses by date — everything that has a date on it.

finance.title: Finances
finance.text: Connect SUMIT and Green Invoice, set up recurring income and expenses, sort into categories — and lay out your cash flow exactly the way you want.

clients.title: Leads and clients
clients.text: We help you hold the relationship from the first inquiry to the last session, so it stays effortless for you and for your clients alike.

insights.title: Daily insights
insights.text: Knowing this is a person, not just a business, led us to build a system that sees the whole picture — holistic and personal.

projects.title: Projects
projects.text: Group cohorts, one-on-one clients; build and tailor a mini-system for each project on its own — so breadth and focus only strengthen each other.

goals.title: Goals and big picture
goals.text: Set monthly goals and see at a glance whether you're on pace to reach them.

feedback.title: You're the heart of Simplicity
feedback.text: Wide-open access to give feedback — anytime, on anything. Because good software isn't built in an ivory tower, but together with the people who use it. Every word from you helps Simplicity shape itself around you — and we're here to listen.

trust.title: Your data — yours alone.
trust.sub: Privacy isn't just another setting. It's part of the calm.

secure.title: Protected and safe
secure.text: Your data is stored on servers in Ireland (EU), protected at the infrastructure level, and fully isolated — only you can reach your data.

hebrew.title: Built in Hebrew
hebrew.text: Right-to-left from the ground up, with masculine, feminine or neutral address — your choice.

noAds.title: No ads, no selling your data
noAds.text: Your information is never passed to anyone. It's yours alone, full stop.

fit.a: For {{therapist}}, {{teacher}} and {{facilitator}} — and anyone who guides people and runs their own practice, solo or in groups. It fits even if you're just starting out.

start.q: How long does it take to get started?
start.a: Minutes. Sign up, tell us about your practice, and you can even import existing clients and finances from a spreadsheet — Simplicity recognizes the columns automatically.

privacy.a: Your data is stored on servers in Ireland (EU), protected at the infrastructure level, and isolated so only you can reach it — we never sell or share it with anyone.

price.a: You can start for free and create an account with no credit card, to get to know Simplicity at your own pace.

install.q: Do I need to install anything?
install.a: No. Simplicity works in your browser and on mobile, and you can add it to your home screen as an app — no downloads, no updates.

hebrew.q: Is it really built for Hebrew and for me?
hebrew.a: Absolutely. Built from the ground up in full Hebrew and right-to-left, with shekels, Hebrew dates, and masculine, feminine or neutral address.

cta.title: It all starts here.
cta.sub: Join the {{roles}} who already run their practice with calm — all in one place.
cta.micro: Free to sign up · Leave anytime · Import and export all your data

footer.tagline: An operating system for your practice — for {{roles}}. Built with love, to help create a little more good in the world.
